name: Concat
description: Concatenates two strings with an optional separator.
python_code:
from src.nodes.base import BaseNode

async def execute(self, inputs):
    a = inputs.get('a') or self.get_parameter('a', '')
    b = inputs.get('b') or self.get_parameter('b', '')
    sep = inputs.get('sep') if inputs.get('sep') is not None else self.get_parameter('sep', '')
    try:
        res = str(a) + (str(sep) if sep else '') + str(b)
    except Exception as e:
        self.log_info(f'Concat error: {e}')
        res = ''

    await self.set_output('result', res)
    await self.set_output('exec_out', True)
    return {'result': res}
